name: marketplace-tools
description: Meta-plugin for authoring and reviewing candidate contributions to the sten-ayunit marketplace. Skills: skill-review (audits a candidate SKILL.md against a target plugin's conventions AND live-checks references against the Ayunit MCP tool surface + docs); artifact-review (audits a candidate live-artifact HTML for Cowork bridge usage, MCP-tool existence, sibling consistency, and security hygiene). Commands: /skill-new (Ayunit-aware skill-creator flow that surfaces the MCP doc catalogue up-front and live-verifies every reference before writing the SKILL.md).
